metadata.title: Move Viewer Template & Cleanup Deprecated Folders

story.iWant: the viewer-template.html moved out of config/ and deprecated folders removed
story.soThat: the config/ folder only contains shareable brand assets and the codebase structure is clean

tasks.task: Update `scripts/regenerate-viewer.js` line 61 to use new path (AC: #2)
Update `theme-edit/instructions.md` - remove deprecated sample generation logic (AC: #5)
Final verification - confirm config/ only has theme.json, theme-history/, catalog/

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given `.slide-builder/config/templates/viewer-template.html` exists, when the refactoring is complete, then `viewer-template.html` exists at `.slide-builder/templates/viewer-template.html`
Given the new viewer-template location, when running `node scripts/regenerate-viewer.js claude-code-fundamentals`, then the viewer generates successfully without errors
Given deprecated folders exist, when the refactoring is complete, then `.slide-builder/config/templates/` directory does not exist
Given deprecated folders exist, when the refactoring is complete, then `.slide-builder/config/samples/` directory does not exist
Given workflow instructions reference `config/samples/`, when the refactoring is complete, then all workflow instructions reference `config/catalog/` instead
Given CONVENTIONS.md documents the file structure, when the refactoring is complete, then CONVENTIONS.md includes the `templates/` folder for framework templates

doc.title: Technical Specification: Move Viewer Template & Cleanup
doc.snippet: Complete technical specification for this refactoring story, including source tree changes, directory structure before/after, workflow reference updates, and testing strategy.

doc.title: Catalog System Tech Spec
doc.snippet: Documents the catalog system that replaces the deprecated samples/ and templates/ folders.

doc.title: Config Folder Tech Spec
doc.snippet: Original config folder restructuring spec that established the shareable brand assets pattern.

doc.title: Slide Builder Conventions
doc.snippet: Defines conventions and patterns including command-to-workflow mapping and file structure. Needs update to include templates/ folder.

file.reason: Contains hardcoded path to viewer-template.html at config/templates/ - must be updated to templates/
References config/samples/ for layout patterns - must update to config/catalog/
Multiple references to config/samples/ - must update all to config/catalog/
Contains sample generation logic that writes to config/samples/ - must be updated or removed
Contains cleanup logic for deprecated directories - verify it's still relevant
The 249KB viewer template file that needs to be moved to .slide-builder/templates/

constraints.constraint: Path variables in workflows use `{project-root}/.slide-builder/` pattern
config/ folder should only contain shareable brand assets (theme.json, theme-history/, catalog/)
templates/ folder at .slide-builder/templates/ is for framework templates (not shareable)
Catalog references use config/catalog/ for slide layout templates

tests.standards: Manual validation only - no automated test framework for this story. Tests are command-line verification and file system checks.

locations.location: Manual CLI: ls commands to verify folder structure

ideas.idea: Verify viewer-template.html exists at new location: ls .slide-builder/templates/viewer-template.html
Run viewer generation: node scripts/regenerate-viewer.js claude-code-fundamentals - should succeed
Verify config/templates/ removed: ls .slide-builder/config/templates/ should fail
Verify config/samples/ removed: ls .slide-builder/config/samples/ should fail
Grep for "config/samples" in workflows - should return no matches
Check CONVENTIONS.md includes templates/ folder documentation
